Functions.Name: MatchesTag
Functions.Description: Determine if TagOne matches against TagTwo

Params.Name: TagOne
Params.Description: Tag to check for match

Params.Name: TagTwo
Params.Description: Tag to check match against

Params.Name: bExactMatch
Params.Description: If true, the tag has to be exactly present, if false then TagOne will include it's parent tags while matching

Functions.Name: MatchesAnyTags
Functions.Description: Determine if TagOne matches against any tag in OtherContainer

Params.Name: TagOne
Params.Description: Tag to check for match

Params.Name: OtherContainer
Params.Description: Container to check against.

Params.Name: bExactMatch
Params.Description: If true, the tag has to be exactly present, if false then TagOne will include it's parent tags while matching

Return.Description: True if TagOne matches any tags explicitly present in OtherContainer

Functions.Name: EqualEqual_GameplayTag
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are equal (A == B)

Functions.Name: NotEqual_GameplayTag
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are not equal (A != B)

Functions.Name: IsGameplayTagValid
Functions.Description: Returns true if the passed in gameplay tag is non-null

Functions.Name: GetTagName
Functions.Description: Returns FName of this tag

Functions.Name: MakeLiteralGameplayTag
Functions.Description: Creates a literal FGameplayTag

Functions.Name: GetNumGameplayTagsInContainer
Functions.Description: Get the number of gameplay tags in the specified container

Params.Name: TagContainer
Params.Description: Tag container to get the number of tags from

Return.Description: The number of tags in the specified container

Functions.Name: HasTag
Functions.Description: Check if the tag container has the specified tag

Params.Name: TagContainer
Params.Description: Container to check for the tag

Params.Name: Tag
Params.Description: Tag to check for in the container

Params.Name: bExactMatch
Params.Description: If true, the tag has to be exactly present, if false then TagContainer will include it's parent tags while matching

Return.Description: True if the container has the specified tag, false if it does not

Functions.Name: HasAnyTags
Functions.Description: Check if the specified tag container has ANY of the tags in the other container

Params.Name: TagContainer
Params.Description: Container to check if it matches any of the tags in the other container

Params.Name: OtherContainer
Params.Description: Container to check against.

Params.Name: bExactMatch
Params.Description: If true, the tag has to be exactly present, if false then TagContainer will include it's parent tags while matching

Return.Description: True if the container has ANY of the tags in the other container

Functions.Name: HasAllTags
Functions.Description: Check if the specified tag container has ALL of the tags in the other container

Params.Name: TagContainer
Params.Description: Container to check if it matches all of the tags in the other container

Params.Name: OtherContainer
Params.Description: Container to check against. If this is empty, the check will succeed

Params.Name: bExactMatch
Params.Description: If true, the tag has to be exactly present, if false then TagContainer will include it's parent tags while matching

Return.Description: True if the container has ALL of the tags in the other container

Functions.Name: DoesContainerMatchTagQuery
Functions.Description: Check if the specified tag container matches the given Tag Query

Params.Name: TagContainer
Params.Description: Container to check if it matches all of the tags in the other container

Params.Name: TagQuery
Params.Description: Query to match against

Return.Description: True if the container matches the query, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: GetAllActorsOfClassMatchingTagQuery
Functions.Description: Get an array of all actors of a specific class (or subclass of that class) which match the specified gameplay tag query.

Params.Name: ActorClass
Params.Description: Class of actors to fetch

Params.Name: GameplayTagQuery
Params.Description: Query to match against

Functions.Name: AddGameplayTag
Functions.Description: Adds a single tag to the passed in tag container

Params.Name: Tag
Params.Description: The tag to add to the container

Functions.Name: RemoveGameplayTag
Functions.Description: Remove a single tag from the passed in tag container, returns true if found

Params.Name: Tag
Params.Description: The tag to add to the container

Functions.Name: AppendGameplayTagContainers
Functions.Description: Appends all tags in the InTagContainer to InOutTagContainer

Params.Name: InOutTagContainer
Params.Description: The container that will be appended too.

Params.Name: InTagContainer
Params.Description: The container to append.

Functions.Name: EqualEqual_GameplayTagContainer
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are equal (A == B)

Functions.Name: NotEqual_GameplayTagContainer
Functions.Description: Returns true if the values are not equal (A != B)

Functions.Name: MakeLiteralGameplayTagContainer
Functions.Description: Creates a literal FGameplayTagContainer

Functions.Name: MakeGameplayTagContainerFromArray
Functions.Description: Creates a FGameplayTagContainer from the array of passed in tags

Functions.Name: MakeGameplayTagContainerFromTag
Functions.Description: Creates a FGameplayTagContainer containing a single tag

Functions.Name: BreakGameplayTagContainer
Functions.Description: Breaks tag container into explicit array of tags

Functions.Name: MakeGameplayTagQuery
Functions.Description: Creates a literal FGameplayTagQuery

Params.Name: TagQuery
Params.Description: value to set the FGameplayTagQuery to

Functions.Name: HasAllMatchingGameplayTags
Functions.Description: Check Gameplay tags in the interface has all of the specified tags in the tag container (expands to include parents of asset tags)

Params.Name: TagContainerInterface
Params.Description: An Interface to a tag container

Params.Name: OtherContainer
Params.Description: A Tag Container

Return.Description: True if the tagcontainer in the interface has all the tags inside the container.

Functions.Name: DoesTagAssetInterfaceHaveTag
Functions.Description: Check if the specified tag container has the specified tag, using the specified tag matching types

Params.Name: TagContainerInterface
Params.Description: An Interface to a tag container

Params.Name: Tag
Params.Description: Tag to check for in the container

Return.Description: True if the container has the specified tag, false if it does not

Functions.Name: NotEqual_TagTag
Functions.Description: Checks if a gameplay tag's name and a string are not equal to one another

Functions.Name: NotEqual_TagContainerTagContainer
Functions.Description: Checks if a gameplay tag containers's name and a string are not equal to one another

Functions.Name: GetDebugStringFromGameplayTagContainer
Functions.Description: Returns an FString listing all of the gameplay tags in the tag container for debugging purposes.

Params.Name: TagContainer
Params.Description: The tag container to get the debug string from.

Functions.Name: GetDebugStringFromGameplayTag
Functions.Description: Returns an FString representation of a gameplay tag for debugging purposes.

Params.Name: GameplayTag
Params.Description: The tag to get the debug string from.
